cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, namaste, sir! This is Rohan from Himachal Pradesh State Electricity Board. I hope you're doing well, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, I'm fine, thank you. What's this about?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, we have a planned power outage in your area tomorrow for some maintenance work. It will be from 10 AM to 2 PM, Thik hai?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, that's fine. Can you please tell me the purpose of the maintenance?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Absolutely, sir! We're upgrading our infrastructure to provide better services to our customers, Achha. I apologize for the inconvenience this might cause.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 30s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A legitimate agent from [STATE_ELECTRICITY_BOARD] calls to inform a customer about a planned power outage in their area for maintenance work the next day. They provide the exact timings and apologize for the inconvenience.
